channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HDFCBANK] HDFC Bank Board approves Q4/FY26 results, ₹13 dividend, ₹60,000 Cr fundraise
item.description:
HDFC Bank's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 18, 2026, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified audit opinion. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹13.00 per equity share for FY26, bringing the total dividend for the year to ₹15.50 per share (including a special interim dividend of ₹2.50). The record date for the final dividend is June 19, 2026. Additionally, the Board approved the issuance of Perpetual Debt Instruments, Tier II Capital Bonds, and Long-Term Bonds for infrastructure financing, totaling up to ₹60,000 crore, through private placement, subject to shareholder approval. Amendments to the Employee Stock Incentive Scheme, 2022, including a 5-year extension until May 13, 2031, were also approved, pending shareholder consent via Postal Ballot.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Recommended final dividend of ₹13.00 per share for FY26.
  • Total FY26 dividend is ₹15.50 per share.
  • Approved ₹60,000 crore fundraising via debt instruments.
  • Approved amendments to Employee Stock Incentive Scheme, extending validity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Bank Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NETWORK18] Network18 Q4 FY26 Loss ₹72.51 Cr; FY26 Profit ₹265.93 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, the company reported a standalone loss of ₹72.51 crore on revenue from operations of ₹547.07 crore, with a standalone loss per share of ₹0.47. For the full financial year 2026, the company posted a standalone profit of ₹265.93 crore with revenue from operations at ₹1,955.07 crore, resulting in a standalone EPS of ₹1.72. The statutory auditors, Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements.

  • Q4 FY26 standalone loss was ₹72.51 crore.
  • Q4 FY26 standalone revenue from operations reached ₹547.07 crore.
  • FY26 standalone profit stood at ₹265.93 crore.
  • FY26 standalone revenue from operations was ₹1,955.07 crore.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETWORK18 MEDIA & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [NETWORK18] Network18 Q4 FY26 Revenue up 9.7% to ₹616 Cr, EBITDA up 59.5% to ₹30 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Network18 Media & Investments Limited announced its audited financial results for Q4 and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, consolidated operating revenue increased by 9.7% year-on-year to ₹616 crores, a strong performance despite macro-economic headwinds. Consolidated operating EBITDA for the quarter was ₹30 crores, marking a significant 59.5% YoY growth. For the full FY26, consolidated operating revenue grew by 4.7% YoY to ₹2,121 crores. The company's TV ad inventory consumption grew 4.5% YoY, contrasting with an industry decline of over 10%. Network18 maintained its position as the #1 news network in India across TV and digital platforms, showing leadership in key regional markets and YouTube. New businesses like Moneycontrol Fintech and Creator18 also demonstrated impressive scale-up.

  • Q4 FY26 consolidated revenue rose 9.7% YoY to ₹616 crores.
  • Q4 FY26 operating EBITDA increased 59.5% YoY to ₹30 crores.
  • FY26 consolidated revenue grew 4.7% YoY to ₹2,121 crores.
  • TV ad inventory consumption grew 4.5% YoY, outperforming industry.
  • Maintained #1 news network position across TV and digital platforms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NETWORK18 MEDIA & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [LAOPALA] La Opala RG: Independent Director Prof. Santanu Ray passes away
item.description:
La Opala RG Ltd has announced the sad demise of Prof. Santanu Ray, an Independent Director of the company, on April 18, 2026. The company expressed its deep regret and sorrow, stating that his sudden and unexpected passing represents an irreparable loss. The intimation was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. All directors and employees extended their deepest sympathies and condolences to his family.

  • Independent Director Prof. Santanu Ray passed away on April 18, 2026.
  • His demise creates a vacancy on the company's Board of Directors.
  • The company notified the stock exchange as per SEBI Regulation 30.
  • His passing is considered an irreparable loss to the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LA OPALA RG LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NAVA] Nava clarifies volume spurt is market-driven
item.description:
Nava Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a recent spurt in its trading volume. The company affirmed its compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, ensuring timely disclosure of all material information and events. Nava Ltd stated that the increase in trading volume of its securities appears to be purely market-driven and is not attributable to any action or omission by the company.

  • Nava Ltd clarified recent trading volume increase.
  • Company attributes spurt to market-driven factors.
  • No company action or omission caused the volume.
  • Nava complies with SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nava Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [7SEASL] 7Seas Entertainment: Promoter acquires 1.5L warrants via preferential allotment
item.description:
Lingamaneni Anirudh, a promoter of 7Seas Entertainment Ltd, has acquired 1,50,000 convertible warrants through a preferential allotment on April 16, 2026. This acquisition represents 0.61% of the total diluted share/voting capital of the company. The disclosure was made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, indicating a change in promoter shareholding and compliance with insider trading norms. Post-acquisition, the promoter's holding of warrants stands at 1,50,000, contributing to the total diluted share capital of 24,487,245 equity shares.

  • Promoter Lingamaneni Anirudh acquired 1,50,000 convertible warrants.
  • Acquisition was via preferential allotment on April 16, 2026.
  • Warrants represent 0.61% of total diluted share capital.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover and Insider Trading Regulations.
  • Total diluted share capital post-allotment is 24,487,245 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 7Seas Entertainment Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [SHAKTIPUMP] Shakti Pumps invests 17 Cr in subsidiary for 2.20 GW solar plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Shakti Pumps (India) Limited has invested 17 Crores in its wholly-owned subsidiary, Shakti Energy Solutions Limited (SESL), on April 17, 2026. This investment is aimed at establishing a greenfield high-efficiency Solar DCR cell and Solar PV modules manufacturing plant in Pithampur, Madhya Pradesh, with a production capacity of 2.20 GW. SESL, incorporated in 2010, currently manufactures solar structures and solar rooftops, reporting a turnover of 216.53 Crores for FY25. The investment is made in consideration of equity shares and is not classified as a related party transaction.

  • Shakti Pumps invested 17 Cr in its wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • Funds will establish a 2.20 GW solar cell and module plant.
  • Subsidiary, Shakti Energy Solutions, had 216.53 Cr turnover in FY25.
  • Investment aims to expand into high-efficiency solar manufacturing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHAKTI PUMPS (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [7SEASL] 7Seas Entertainment: Promoter L Maruti Sanker acquires 1.5 Lac shares
item.description:
L. Maruti Sanker, a promoter of 7Seas Entertainment Ltd, has acquired 150,000 equity shares through a preferential allotment on April 16, 2026. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and Regulation 7(2) read with Regulation 6(2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Following this acquisition, the promoter's shareholding in the company has increased.

  • Promoter L. Maruti Sanker acquired 150,000 equity shares.
  • The shares were acquired via preferential allotment.
  • The acquisition date was April 16, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover and Insider Trading Regulations.
  • The promoter's shareholding in 7Seas Entertainment increased.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 7Seas Entertainment Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [YESBANK] Yes Bank approves Q4 & FY26 Audited Standalone & Consolidated Results
item.description:
Yes Bank's Board of Directors approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and the full year ended March 31, 2026, at its meeting on April 18, 2026. The Joint Statutory Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on these financial results. The bank confirmed that the proceeds from non-convertible debt securities were fully utilized without any deviations from stated objects. Furthermore, Yes Bank reported no outstanding secured listed non-convertible debt securities as of March 31, 2026, making certain disclosure requirements inapplicable. The board meeting for these financial matters concluded at 01:50 PM.

  • Board approved Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Joint Statutory Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • Non-convertible debt securities proceeds were fully utilized with no deviations.
  • No outstanding secured listed non-convertible debt securities as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YES BANK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [STLTECH] Blue Daimond Properties Sells 0.34% Stake in Sterlite Technologies
item.description:
Blue Daimond Properties Pvt Ltd, along with persons acting in concert, sold 16,47,833 shares of Sterlite Technologies Ltd, representing 0.34% of the voting capital. The shares were sold in the open market between April 15-17, 2026. This transaction reduced their total shareholding from 5.30% (2,58,78,205 shares) to 4.96% (2,42,30,372 shares) of the company's voting capital. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Blue Daimond Properties sold 16.48 lakh shares of Sterlite Technologies.
  • The sale represented 0.34% of the company's voting capital.
  • Their holding decreased from 5.30% to 4.96% post-sale.
  • Shares were sold in the open market from April 15-17, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STERLITE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Shareholding
